nodes.title: Model links Extra
widgets_values:
### Frame Interpolation
- [frame interpolation models](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/frame_interpolation/tree/main/frame_interpolation) (optional)
- [Upscale model](https://openmodeldb.info/) (optional)
## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 frame_interpolation/
│   │   └── *.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 upscale_models
│   │   └── *.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Model links WAN22
widgets_values:
### I2V
- [DaSiWa WAN 2.2 i2v 14B (S) Lightspeed](https://civitai.com/models/1981116)
   
  OR other models (like GGUF) from my collection
- [DaSiWa Collection](https://civitai.com/collections/13277112)
### S2V
- [DaSiWa WAN 2.2 S2V 14B Lightspeed](https://civitai.com/models/2151205)

### VAE

- [wan_2.1_vae.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/blob/main/split_files/vae/wan_2.1_vae.safetensors)

### Text_encoders

- [umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors)

## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 unet/
│   │   └── *.safetensors / *.gguf
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │   └── wan_2.1_vae.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │   └── umt5_xxl_fp8_e4m3fn_scaled.safetensors 
│   ├── 📂 audio_encoders/ 
│   │   └── wav2vec2_large_english_fp16.safetensors
```

nodes.title: Basic usage
widgets_values:
# 📚 READ ME

## Initial setup
1. Download and place needed models and files
2. Select a model **type** 📀Safetensors or 💿GGUF
3. Select an **engine** 🖼️➡️🎥 I2V or 🖼️🖼️➡️🎥 FLF2V
4. Set which "Resolution preset" and "Method" to use (see Resolution Guide)
  - (optional) Enable fitting **Rendering features**
  - (optional) Add LoRAs 
  - (optional) Enable any or multiple **Post-processing features**
5. Add first-frame and/or last-frame image
6. Write your prompts
7. Generate

## Shortcuts / Bookmarks

| Numberkey | Description/Target |
|----------:|-------------------:|
|0          | Notes |
|1          | Frontend with settings and inputs |
|2          | Backend - main |
|3          | Backend - post-processing |
|4          | Backend - audio |

nodes.title: Backend
widgets_values:
| Setting | Default / Example | Description | |--------:|------------------:|------------:| | Seconds | 5 | Set the desired length of the video in seconds. | | CRF | 20, webm, VP9 | Video compression level. Visually lossless. Set on VHS Node.| | FPS | 16 | Frames per second for videos. Use 24 for faster motion/shorter videos. | | Shift | 5 | Adjust and test; WAN 2.2 valid in range 5–10. | | Steps total | 4 | Total steps - node handles step math. More steps → higher quality but longer generation. Use even numbers. | | Step Refiner | 2 | Default 2 (50% of 4). Change to test different swap behavior. | | CFG | 1.0 | Controls prompt adherence. Use 1-1.5. 1 disables/ignores the negative prompt. 1.0 is needed for speed-up's like 4/8-step models/LoRAs | | Sampler | euler | "Euler" works every time. Other samplers can enhance detail or motion. This has major impact on how the video is generated. | | Scheduler | simple | "Simple" works every time. Others like "beta" and others can enhance some samplers. | | Seed | number + randomize | Random outcome every run. Set a specific seed to reproduce the same outcome. | | Sage Attention | disabled | Can be enabled **if installed correctly** to speed-up video generation times. | | Watermark upload | none | Here you can upload a watermark image and calibrate the settings to your liking (subgraph). | | Positive prompt | none | Write your positive prompt!
1) Brief description of the setting/appearance
2) Actions, motions, story
3) Camera composition
CFG 1 normally disables/ignores the negative prompt! NAG effectively enables negative prompting on CFG 1.| | Negative prompt | none | Write what you would like to exclude. Works only if CFG > 1 or NAG is enabled | | Checkpoints | Safetensors/GGUf |Choose the type of Checkpoint to use. Wan 2.2 uses a different diffusion model for the first steps (high noise) vs the last steps (low noise). You can ether use safetensors or gguf.| | VAE | same as WAN 2.1 | Still using the same VAE as WAN 2.1. | | CLIP | standard encoder | Use your preferred standard CLIP text encoder. No CLIP Vision H — not trained/implemented in WAN 2.2 and weights are disabled. | | Upscaler model | any | The optional used model for Upscaling /w model. A downloaded upscaling-model is needed. |

nodes.title: Seconds and frames
widgets_values:
The optimal frame count is calculated automatically based on input seconds.

* **16 FPS** - 5 seconds are native. After that WAN 2.2 starts looping back
* **24 FPS** - 3 seconds are native. After that WAN 2.2 starts looping back.

Both equals the standard frame length of WAN 2.2.
✅ Here you set your last frame of your video.
✅ Here you set your initial image (frame) of your video.
🎦 Here will be your final video result.

🎞️ The last frame of you final result.

This will always select the last run method, even if you selected multiple options! (Interpolation node > FLF2V node > i2v only)

The image will be saved on the same folder as your video.
You can start with this again to expand your video.
🎞️ The mini-meme will show up here.

nodes.title: Post-processing
widgets_values:
| Feature | Default / Example | Description |
|--------:|------------------:|------------:|
| Color match | off | This will try to match the color from the initial image to the samples. The color match algorithms default is set by default to '0.75'. Feel free to test other strength. |
| Perfect loop | off | This can be used with FLF2V or I2V. It will try to find the seamless frame to loop back to the start and blending frames together. 💡 Best used with "color match". Try using more frames, e.g. higher seconds. Sometimes FLV2V will morph. |
| Interpolation | off | This will interpolate your video to double fps at the end. Interpolated FPS = 2 × FPS. |
| Upscale 2x (fast) | off | Final resolution = 2 × start resolution while maintaining aspect ratio. No morph; color-correct fast lanczos upscale. Low VRAM consumption. |
| Upscale /w Model (slow) | off | Final resolution depends on the used upscaler model; Can change/enhance details and high VRAM consumption. |
| RTX Super Resolution | off | 4x ultra fast accurate upscaling. RTX cards only. |
| Watermark | off | Enable for a watermark overlay on video. |
| Soundmark | off | Enable for a soundmark overlay on video. |
| Extract Last Frame | off | Enable to extract the last frame of the video as image. |
| MiniMeme | off | This will create a mini gif from your video down scaled by 5 for meme's or discord. |

nodes.title: WAN22 Video prompt negative
widgets_values: censored, mosaic censoring, bar censor, pixelated, glowing, bloom, blurry, out of focus, low detail, bad anatomy, ugly, overexposed, underexposed, distorted face, extra limbs, cartoonish, 3d render artifacts, duplicate people, unnatural lighting, bad composition, missing shadows, low resolution, poorly textured, glitch, noise, grain, static, motionless, still frame, stylized, artwork, painting, illustration, many people in background, three legs, walking backward, unnatural skin tone, discolored eyelid, red eyelids, closed eyes, poorly drawn hands, extra fingers, fused fingers, poorly drawn face, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fog, mist, voluminous eyelashes,

nodes.title: Video codec, CRF, compression and quality
widgets_values:
| Codec | CRF | Visual impact | Compatibility | Quality and compression |
|----------|-----|-------|-----|-----|
| AV1 | 30 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| h265 | 19 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| VP9 | 20 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |
| h264 | 19 | lossless | ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ | ⭐⭐ |


💡 *Tip* For AI-generated videos:
* AV1 (webm) or VP9 (webm) for websites
* AV1 (webm) or h265 (mp4) for local store

nodes.title: Info
widgets_values:
## 🚀 VRAM optimization and spacial options
- ⚙️ Chunking settings for longer videos, chunks will be automatically calculated based on frame-count/length.

VRAM Headroom (use 1.0 for 24GB, 2.0 for 16GB, 3.0 for 12 GB, 4.0 for 8 GB)

nodes.title: Rendering
widgets_values:
| Setting | Default / Example | Description | |--------:|------------------:|------------:| | SageAttention | off | Needs to be installed! Possibly accelerates generation. | | FP16 accumulation | on | Adds computational speed and memory efficiency | | NAG | off | This will use your negative condition and concat it with the standard WAN AI negative prompt for convenience.
If you do not want this, just disable the standard negative node.
⚠️NAG needs a lot of VRAM, so if you do not need this. Just let it be disabled. | |🔱 TritonVAE| on | Enables Triton patched VAE on VAE decode loading. Slow first run for optimization, massive speed-up on successive runs. |

nodes.title: Resolution Note
widgets_values:
# 🛠 Resolution Guide

### 1. Define your "Resolution Preset"
Choose between:
* **Precision Presets:** Optimized Megapixel tiers. **0.52 MP (SD)** is the baseline for most video models.
* **Resolution Presets:** Standard targets (e.g., **1080p**). The node adjusts the actual dimensions to fit your custom aspect ratio while keeping the "1080p density."

### 2. The "Bypass" (No Scale)
* **Toggle ON:** Disables all calculations. The node outputs the exact width/height of the source image/manual input. Use this for native-resolution upscaling or final renders.

nodes.title: Changelog
widgets_values:
## Requirements - [ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite](https://github.com/Kosinkadink/ComfyUI-VideoHelperSuite) - [rgthree-comfy](https://github.com/rgthree/rgthree-comfy) - [Comfyui-WhiteRabbit](https://github.com/Artificial-Sweetener/comfyui-WhiteRabbit)
+ *packaging, torchlanc* - [ComfyUI-KJNodes](https://github.com/kijai/ComfyUI-KJNodes) - [ComfyUI-GGUF](https://github.com/city96/ComfyUI-GGUF) - [ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes](https://github.com/darksidewalker/ComfyUI-DaSiWa-Nodes) - [ComfyUI-LTXVideo](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo) - [ffmpeg](https://www.ffmpeg.org/) - [Sage Attention](https://github.com/thu-ml/SageAttention) (optional) --- ## Features - 🖼️ **I2V and FLF2V** - 🧩 **Automatic aspect‑ratio calculation and fitting** - ✨ **Multiple Upscalers** - 🤝 **Video resolution matching** - Fully automatic scaling and resolution calculations - 🕠 **Length automation** - Fully automatic calculation of frame count - 🫥 **Watermark** option - 🧮 **Color match** feature - 👾 **MiniMeme** feature - Create small gif's - 🎭 **NAG** - Negative prompting with CFG1 - 🪄 **Interpolation** feature - 🌀 **Perfect loop** feature - 🃏 **Last Frame Extraction** - 🔖 **Bookmark-Shortcuts** - with number keys --- ## Latest Changes / Fixes - Added TritonVAE patch

b: Width

c: Height

d: VRAM Headroom (use 1.0 for 24GB, 2.0 for 16GB, 3.0 for 12 GB, 4.0 for 8 GB)
